_comment: CWC LOGICAL SCHEMA — AI returns this. C# assembler builds the real manifest.json (Siemens nested format), index.html, code.js, styles.css and packages the zip. AI writes the COMPLETE code.js including WebCC.start() with real method implementations.

cwc_info.name: GaugeMeter
cwc_info.description: A circular gauge control bound to a PLC analog tag

properties._comment: SIMPLE NUMBER PROPERTY — becomes type:number in manifest
properties.name: GaugeValue
properties.description: Current value shown on the gauge

properties.name: UnitLabel
properties.description: Unit string shown below the numeric value

events._comment: EVENT WITH TYPED ARGUMENT — fires from control up to WinCC
events.name: ZoneChanged
events.description: Fired when the gauge value moves into a new zone

events._comment: EVENT WITHOUT ARGUMENT — use empty arguments array
events.name: OnAlarmTriggered

methods._comment: METHOD WITH PARAMETER — WinCC calls this on the control from outside
methods.name: BlinkZone
methods.description: Makes the specified zone blink visually

methods._comment: METHOD WITHOUT PARAMETER — use empty parameters array
methods.name: ResetDisplay
methods.description: Resets the gauge to its minimum visual state

_comment_libs: List filenames only of third-party libraries needed. Must exist in cwc_assets/ folder. C# copies them to control/js/ in the zip. Use [] if no libraries are needed.
_comment_html: COMPLETE index.html. Load ./js/webcc.min.js FIRST in <head>. Load third-party libs in <head> after webcc. Load ./styles.css in <head>. Load ./code.js at END of <body> only.
_comment_js: COMPLETE code.js. AI writes the FULL file including WebCC.start(). The contract passed to WebCC.start() MUST have: methods as an object with real implementations, events as an array of name strings, properties as an object with default values. All names must EXACTLY match the 'properties'/'events'/'methods' arrays declared above — same case, same spelling.
